name: Swiss Cheese Fondue
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons kirsch, rum or brandy, optional
ground nutmeg or pepper to taste
bread, cooked meat, vegetables for dippers
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the swiss cheese with flour.
2. Rub the inside of the fondue pot with garlic.
3. Pour in wine and heat until warm but not boiling.
4. Add the swiss cheese by handfuls, stirring continuously with a wooden spoon until melted (appearance of light creamy sauce).
5. Add kirsch, Parmesan and seasonings.
6. Let come to boil once, stirring continuously.
7. Serve with dippers.
